recommendations.title: Truth or Dare
recommendations.overview: A harmless game of "Truth or Dare" among friends turns deadly when someone—or something—begins to punish those who tell a lie—or refuse the dare.

recommendations.title: Truth or Dare
recommendations.overview: A group of friends are lured to an isolated cabin by a promise of heavy partying, only to find themselves in a nightmarish game of truth or dare.

recommendations.title: Triple Dog
recommendations.overview: On the night of a sleepover, a group of teenage girls venture out in a competitive game of challenging dares. As the antics escalate, and the dares become more extreme, the girls unravel the truth behind a former student's rumored suicide.

recommendations.title: Nerve
recommendations.overview: Industrious high school senior Vee Delmonico has had it with living life on the sidelines. When pressured by friends to join the popular online game Nerve, Vee decides to sign up for just one dare in what seems like harmless fun. But as she finds her

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In 2026, a new machine called the Augma is developed to compete against the NerveGear and its successor, the Amusphere. A next-gen wearable device, the Augma doesn't have a full-dive function like its predecessors. Instead, it uses Augmented Reality

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell

recommendations.title: The Flu
recommendations.overview: A case of the flu quickly morphs into a pandemic. As the death toll mounts and the living panic, the government plans extreme measures to contain it.

recommendations.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary
recommendations.overview: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie - Progressive - Aria of a Starless Night
recommendations.overview: Asuna Yuuki had never played online games until accidentally putting on the NerveGear for Sword Art Online, the world’s first VRMMORPG. She soon finds herself and other players trapped inside a game, where if a player dies in the game, they die in th

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.
